metadata.name: Re-route a Truck Due to Road Closure

description: A dispatcher receives an alert about an unexpected highway closure on a driver's route. They must re-route the driver.

nodes.task_description: Receive a traffic alert about a major accident and highway closure.

expected_outcome.value: Dispatcher is aware of the road closure.

nodes.task_description: Identify all trucks whose current routes are affected by the closure.

expected_outcome.value: The system identifies one truck that is routed onto the closed highway.

nodes.task_description: Calculate an optimal detour route for the affected truck.

expected_outcome.value: A new route is generated that bypasses the closure.

nodes.task_description: Send the new route and instructions to the driver's in-cab navigation device.

expected_outcome.value: The driver receives the updated route.
